mof_business_term: Sum of invoice line net amount
transformation_rule: Compute sum(lines.line_total_excl_vat) and reconcile with headers.total_excl_vat
Read invoice total without tax from headers.total_excl_vat
Read invoice total tax amount from headers.vat_total
Read invoice total amount with tax from headers.total_incl_vat
Read amount due for payment from headers.amount_due
Derive taxable amount by tax category from line net amounts (or reconciled header total)
notes: Current runtime bridge maps field 35 to tax_category_code, which is semantically incomplete.

transformation_rule: Derive tax amount by tax category from line VAT amounts and reconcile to header vat_total
Use tax category code from header and line contexts as required by target nodes
Use tax category rate from header summary and/or line VAT rate in tax breakdown nodes
notes: Priority gap: MoF overlay map currently omits field 38 linkage.

transformation_rule: Read invoice line identifier from lines.line_id/line_number
Read invoiced quantity from lines.quantity
Read unit of measure code from lines.unit_of_measure
Read invoice line net amount from lines.line_total_excl_vat
Read item net price from lines.unit_price
Derive gross price from unit price and line-level charges/allowances when available
Generate price base quantity (typically 1) when not supplied
notes: No explicit source column or transformation contract is implemented.

transformation_rule: Read invoiced item tax category code from lines.tax_category_code
Read invoiced item tax rate from lines.vat_rate

notes: Collision risk with commercial field 48 if keyed by field_id only.

transformation_rule: Derive invoice line amount in AED from line totals and currency conversion policy
